01   Executive Summary

Land Overview &
Investment Rationale

This proposal presents a rare opportunity to acquire a contiguous landholding of approximately 121.45 acres at Khambewadi, Khalapur (Raigad district), situated adjacent to HOAL on State Highway 92 (Khopoli–Pali Road), with landmark proximity to Imagicaa Theme Park.


The site is ideally configured for a Gated Residential Plotting Layout — an integrated bungalow scheme or plotted township. Khambewadi village now falls under the MMR Extended Notified Area (MMR-ENA), superseding the earlier Raigad Regional Plan, which significantly enhances its planning status and long-term appreciation potential.

The majority of the land — 108.96 acres — is held by a single family and their group of private limited companies under clear title, enabling a streamlined, single-day registration. The remaining parcels are subject to specific administrative procedures, detailed in this report.


The land is offered exclusively for outright sale. Joint venture arrangements are not being considered. A company takeover structure is available as an alternative transaction format.

03   Land Holding Pattern

Ownership &
Title Structure

The total holding of approximately 121.45 acres is distributed across four categories based on title status and applicable regulatory permissions. 108.96 acres (89.7%) carry clear title and are ready for immediate registration.

# Category Area Details Status
1 Single Family & Group Pvt Ltd Companies 108.96 Acres Held by a single family and their group of private limited companies. Ready for single-day registration. Clear Title
2 7/12 Extract Transfer Pending 6.395 Acres Transfer in 7/12 Extract pending; awaiting permission under Section 63 Perm. Pending
3 Civil Court Matter 3.745 Acres Transfer reflected in 7/12 Extract; case pending in Civil Court Court Pending
4 Adivasi Land (ROW Permission) 2.35 Acres Tribal land; ROW permission for transfer pending at Mantralaya Mantralaya Pending

Key Strengths

  • 89.7% of land (108.96 acres) carries clear title — swift, single-day registration possible
  • Company takeover option available as alternative deal structure
  • Single seller family significantly reduces counterparty complexity
  • Survey numbers and holding maps shared post-meeting with landowners
  • Now under MMR-ENA jurisdiction — enhanced planning status and value

On-Site Infrastructure

  • Gas Pipeline Corridor running parallel to SH 92 along the site periphery
  • Two HT lines parallel to SH 92: first at 110–120 m inside from road; second ~60–70 m further
  • Internal Devkrish Road visible on Google Maps
  • Direct frontage on State Highway 92 (Khopoli–Pali Road)
04   Technical & Regulatory

Planning Zone &
Development Potential

Zoning: Industrial → Residential Conversion

UDCPR 2020

The land falls within the Industrial Zone of the Sanctioned Raigad Regional Plan, in the Pen–Panvel–Khalapur Growth Centre. Under UDCPR 2020, Industrial-to-Residential (I to R) conversion is permissible for residential use. New building permissions are granted in accordance with UDCPR 2020.

Mumbai Metropolitan Region – Extended Notified Area (MMR-ENA)

MMRDA SPA

Khambewadi is included in the MMR-ENA under Maharashtra Govt. notification dated 9 July 2024 (No. TPS-1224/01/CR-18/24/UD-12). MMRDA is the appointed Special Planning Authority. A GIS-based Development Plan is under preparation; intention declared vide notice dated 18 September 2025 under Section 23 of MR&TP Act, 1966.

Interim Regulatory Framework

Currently Active

Until the new Development Plan and its DCR are published under Section 26(1) of MR&TP Act 1966, the sanctioned Raigad Regional Plan proposals and UDCPR 2020 remain in force. Development permissions are delegated to the District Collector, Raigad-Alibag, vide MMRDA letter dated 3 January 2025.

Gazette Reference – Khambewadi Notification

Schedule IV · Sr. 261

Khambewadi (Khalapur, Raigad) is listed at Sr. No. 261 in Schedule-IV of Maharashtra Govt. notification No. TPS-1224/01/CR.18/24/UD-12 dated 9 July 2024, formally designating it within the MMR Extended Notified Area.

Ideal Development: Gated Plotted Township

Residential Layout

The site is technically well-suited for a Gated Residential Plotting Layout / Bungalow Scheme. Large contiguous area, direct SH 92 frontage, gentle hillside terrain, and proximity to Imagicaa and HOAL make this a compelling proposition for a premium plotted township.
